releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Breaking change: Daily Notes is now the single write target source

`settings.dailyFolder` has been removed in 0.3.0. Quick Add and daily-note writes now read the folder/format from Obsidian's built-in **Daily Notes** core plugin.

Migration:
- Enable Obsidian core plugin **Daily notes**.
- Set Daily notes → **New file location** to your preferred folder. The old Task Center default was `Daily/`.
- If Daily Notes is disabled or missing configuration, Task Center falls back to `settings.inboxPath` instead of a separate daily-folder setting.

## Feature: configurable grouping tags

The old default `#1象限 / #2象限 / #3象限 / #4象限` remains the default. Users can now change the grouping tag set in settings, and the board, Quick Add chips, context menu, keyboard shortcuts, and CLI use the same configured list.

## Generated changes since `0.2.9`

## Features
- feat: support configurable grouping tags (77b1335)

## Fixes
- fix(types,settings,i18n,writer,quickadd,docs): US-32 task #32 — 0.3.0 breaking, remove settings.dailyFolder (263bfda)

## Docs
- docs(UX): task #32 followup — drop "Daily 文件夹" row from settings table (7c5a7e6)
- docs(AGENTS): TDD §1a 测试与实现作者分离（分层强制） (5a8149c)

## Tests
- test(task#32): red tests — US-32 dailyFolder removal (5 failing assertions) (41726e8)

## Other
- 0.3.0 (e26b6d6)

## Mobile install / enable note

Task Center 0.3.0 is mobile-capable (`manifest.json` has `isDesktopOnly: false`), but there is no separate "enable mobile support" switch. Until Task Center is listed in Obsidian's community plugin browser, copy the three release assets `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-task-center/` on the mobile vault, then enable **Task Center** under Obsidian Mobile **Settings → Community plugins**. If it does not appear, confirm Restricted Mode / community plugins are enabled and restart Obsidian Mobile after syncing or copying the files.
